name: Minestronie Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the cheese in the Crock-Pot.
2. Stir thoroughly to combine.
3. Add water to cover all ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8-12 hours or on High for 3-5 hours, stirring well.
5. Serve sprinkled with grated Mozzarella cheese or Parmesan cheese.
Serves 6
